description: Unwrap 2D interferometric SAR (InSAR) phase using sparse optimization (ADMM)

reference.paper: Exploiting Sparsity for Phase Unwrapping, Chartrand et al., IGARSS 2019
reference.method: ADMM with nonconvex sparsity-promoting penalty (G0 shrinkage)
reference.baseline_method: SNAPHU (Statistical-cost Network-flow Algorithm for Phase Unwrapping)
